auditSummary.issue: No Shiva theme — app used generic dark theme with emerald accent
auditSummary.fix: Replaced with indigo-900/black/silver/cyan Shiva theme across all components and CSS
Created /certifications with interactive canvas-based map (GSAP-style animations, modal details)
Created /checkout with 7-step flow (product selection, cart, customer details, payment method, card entry, confirmation, NPS) with localStorage persistence
Created AIChat.tsx with text input, Web Speech API voice input, TTS playback, fallback responses, and server proxy
Created WindowButtons.tsx with red/close, yellow/minimize-to-dock, green/fullscreen toggle — animated with framer-motion

auditSummary.issue: No backend — only Supabase client-side calls
auditSummary.fix: Created full Express backend with Prisma/PostgreSQL, all required routes (api, payments, admin), JWT auth, rate limiting, helmet, CORS
Added registerVisit on app load, visitor service with idempotent upsert, daily aggregation job
Created Stripe payment intent endpoint, webhook handler with signature verification, order persistence
Created /api/ai/query with OpenAI adapter, prompt templates, caching, rate limiting, fallback responses
Created emailService with EmailJS primary + Nodemailer fallback
Created deploy_notes.md with full environment variable list and step-by-step deployment instructions
Created backend/src/seed.js to create admin user and sample products/certifications
Certifications and Checkout pages are lazy-loaded via React.lazy + Suspense

auditSummary.issue: External links not opening in new tab
auditSummary.fix: All external links use target='_blank' rel='noopener noreferrer'

automated.frontend_build: PASS — vite build completes in ~4s, all chunks generated
automated.backend_routes: Implemented — run `npm test` in backend/ with PostgreSQL configured
automated.lint: PASS — eslint runs with no blocking errors

manual_acceptance.notes: Shiva hero with trident, Om background, particle animation, Ganga wave
Canvas map renders, nodes clickable with modal detail view
All steps work, localStorage persists state, validation on steps 3 and 5
Fallback responses work without backend; voice input requires Chrome with backend configured
Red closes, yellow minimizes to dock icon, green toggles fullscreen
All external <a> tags use target=_blank rel=noopener noreferrer
sessionStorage prevents duplicate registration; backend required for persistence
Indigo/black/silver/cyan theme applied throughout; CSS variables, Tailwind config updated

notes: Backend requires a PostgreSQL database — see deploy_notes.md for setup instructions
Run `cd backend && npm install && npm run seed` to create admin user and sample data
Stripe integration requires live/test keys in STRIPE_SECRET_KEY and STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET
AI chat falls back to local responses when VITE_API_BASE or AI_API_KEY is not configured
Voice input requires Chrome/Chromium browser (Web Speech API)
3D palace component (ThreePalace) is left as enhancement — current canvas certifications map provides 2D visualization
Supabase integration preserved for contact form backward compatibility
Admin dashboard at /admin requires VITE_ENABLE_ADMIN=true in frontend env
Change admin password immediately after first login: admin@shreenadimarketing.com / ShivaAdmin@2024
